record_types.name: DWT_CPICNT_Register
DWT_CTRL_Register
DWT_CYCCNT_Register
DWT_EXCCNT_Register
DWT_FOLDCNT_Register
DWT_LSUCNT_Register
DWT_PCSR_Register

variables.name: DWT_CPICNT
variables.code:
DWT_CPICNT   : DWT_CPICNT_Register
  with Import,
       Volatile,
       Full_Access_Only,
       Address => System.Storage_Elements.To_Address (16#E000_1008#);
